001import java.io.File;
002import java.io.FileOutputStream;
003import java.io.IOException;
004import java.io.InputStream;
005import java.net.HttpURLConnection;
006import java.net.URL;
007import java.net.URLEncoder;
008
009/**
010 * Downloads game assets from the ESIEE web server and stores them locally.
011 * <p>
012 * On each launch, checks which assets are missing from the local
013 * {@code assets/} folder and downloads them from the remote server. Files
014 * already present are skipped. Each download is attempted up to
015 * {@value #aMaxRetries} times before being marked as failed. If any downloads
016 * fail, the game continues in offline mode with whatever assets are available.
017 * </p>
018 *
019 * @author Barnabe Jouanard
020 * @version 2026.04.17
021 */
022public class AssetManager {
023    /** URL of the asset location. */
024    private static final String aAssetsUrl = "https://perso.esiee.fr/~jouanarb/assets/";
025    /** Maximum number of download attempts per file before giving up. */
026    private static final int aMaxRetries = 3;
027    /** Local directory where assets are stored. */
028    private static final String aAssetsFolder = "assets";
029    /** Current filename being downloaded. */
030    private String aCurrentFile = "";
031    /** Current progress count. */
032    private int aCurrentProgress = 0;
033    /** Flag indicating whether the download phase is complete. */
034    private boolean aIsComplete = false;
035    /** Error message if any downloads failed (null if all succeeded). */
036    private String aErrorMessage = null;
037    /** List of all asset filenames to download. */
038    private String[] aAessetsList = {
039            "home.gif",
040            "home_map.jpeg",
041            "littleroot town.gif",
042            "littleroot_map.jpeg",
043            "no map.jpeg",
044            "oldale town.gif",
045            "oldale town_map.jpeg",
046            "petalburg city.gif",
047            "petalburg city_map.jpeg",
048            "petalburg woods.gif",
049            "petalburg woods_map.jpeg",
050            "route 101.gif",
051            "route101_map.jpeg",
052            "route 102.gif",
053            "route102_map.jpeg",
054            "rustboro city.gif",
055            "rustboro city_map.jpeg",
056            "sky pilar_map.jpeg",
057            "sky pillar.gif",
058            "lose_screen.png"
059    };
060    /** Total number of assets to download. */
061    private int aTotalAssets = aAessetsList.length;
062
063    /**
064     * Creates a new asset manager.
065     */
066    public AssetManager() {
067        // ensure the assets directory exists
068        File vAssetsFolder = new File(aAssetsFolder);
069        if (!vAssetsFolder.exists()) {
070            vAssetsFolder.mkdirs();
071        }
072    } // AssetManager()
073
074    /**
075     * Checks whether all assets are already present in the local folder.
076     *
077     * @return {@code true} if every file in {@link #aAessetsList} exists locally
078     */
079    public boolean allAssetsCached() {
080        for (String vFileName : aAessetsList) {
081            File vFile = new File(aAssetsFolder + File.separator + vFileName);
082            if (!vFile.exists()) {
083                return false;
084            }
085        }
086        return true;
087    } // allAssetsCached()
088
089    /**
090     * Returns the total number of assets that need to be downloaded.
091     *
092     * @return count of files not yet present in the local folder
093     */
094    public int countMissingAssets() {
095        int vCount = 0;
096        for (String vFileName : aAessetsList) {
097            File vFile = new File(aAssetsFolder + File.separator + vFileName);
098            if (!vFile.exists()) {
099                vCount++;
100            }
101        }
102        return vCount;
103    } // countMissingAssets()
104
105    /**
106     * Downloads all missing assets from the assets url.
107     * <p>
108     * Each file is attempted up to {@value #aMaxRetries} times. If a file still
109     * fails after all retries, it is skipped and the game will run in offline
110     * mode (missing images appear as blank panels).
111     * </p>
112     */
113    public void downloadAssets() {
114        int vFailCount = 0;
115
116        for (int vI = 0; vI < aTotalAssets; vI++) {
117            String vFileName = aAessetsList[vI];
118            File vLocalFile = new File(aAssetsFolder + File.separator + vFileName);
119
120            if (vLocalFile.exists()) {
121                // already stored locally, skip
122                this.aCurrentFile = vFileName;
123                this.aCurrentProgress = vI + 1;
124                continue;
125            }
126
127            boolean vSuccess = false;
128            for (int vAttempt = 1; vAttempt <= aMaxRetries; vAttempt++) {
129                vSuccess = this.downloadFile(vFileName, vLocalFile);
130                if (vSuccess) {
131                    break;
132                }
133            }
134
135            if (!vSuccess) {
136                vFailCount++;
137                System.out.println("Failed to download " + vFileName + " after " + aMaxRetries + " attempts.");
138            }
139
140            this.aCurrentFile = vFileName;
141            this.aCurrentProgress = vI + 1;
142        }
143
144        if (vFailCount > 0) {
145            this.aErrorMessage = vFailCount + " file(s) could not be downloaded. Running in offline mode." + "\n"
146                    + "Try restarting the game with Wi‑Fi, or consider downloading the offline version from the website.";
147            System.out.println(aErrorMessage);
148        }
149        this.aIsComplete = true;
150    } // downloadAssets()
151
152    /**
153     * Downloads a single file from the remote server to the local path.
154     *
155     * @param pFileName  the filename on the server (e.g. {@code "home.gif"})
156     * @param pLocalFile the local destination file
157     * @return {@code true} if the download succeeded; {@code false} otherwise
158     */
159    private boolean downloadFile(final String pFileName, final File pLocalFile) {
160        HttpURLConnection vConnection = null;
161        try {
162            // URL-encode the filename (handles spaces -> %20).
163            String vEncodedName = URLEncoder.encode(pFileName, "UTF-8").replace("+", "%20");
164            URL vUrl = new URL(aAssetsUrl + vEncodedName);
165
166            vConnection = (HttpURLConnection) vUrl.openConnection();
167            vConnection.setConnectTimeout(10000);
168            vConnection.setReadTimeout(10000);
169            vConnection.setRequestMethod("GET");
170
171            int vResponseCode = vConnection.getResponseCode();
172            if (vResponseCode != HttpURLConnection.HTTP_OK) {
173                System.out.println("HTTP " + vResponseCode + " for: " + pFileName);
174                return false;
175            }
176
177            try (InputStream vInput = vConnection.getInputStream();
178                    FileOutputStream vOutput = new FileOutputStream(pLocalFile)) {
179                vInput.transferTo(vOutput);
180            }
181
182            return true;
183        } catch (IOException vException) {
184            System.out.println("Download error for " + pFileName + ": " + vException.getMessage());
185            // Clean up any partial file.
186            if (pLocalFile.exists()) {
187                pLocalFile.delete();
188            }
189            return false;
190        } finally {
191            if (vConnection != null) {
192                vConnection.disconnect();
193            }
194        }
195    } // downloadFile()
196
197    /**
198     * Returns the name of the most recent file processed by {@link #downloadAssets()}.
199     *
200     * @return the current filename (may be empty)
201     */
202    public String getCurrentFile() {
203        return aCurrentFile;
204    }
205
206    /**
207     * Returns the 1-based index of the most recent asset processed by
208     * {@link #downloadAssets()}.
209     *
210     * @return progress count in the range {@code [0..getTotalAssets()]}
211     */
212    public int getCurrentProgress() {
213        return aCurrentProgress;
214    }
215
216    /**
217     * Returns the total number of assets configured for download.
218     *
219     * @return total assets count
220     */
221    public int getTotalAssets() {
222        return aTotalAssets;
223    }
224
225    /**
226     * Indicates whether the asset download phase has completed.
227     *
228     * @return {@code true} once {@link #downloadAssets()} has finished
229     */
230    public boolean isComplete() {
231        return aIsComplete;
232    }
233
234    /**
235     * Returns a human-readable error message when at least one download failed.
236     *
237     * @return error message, or {@code null} when no errors occurred
238     */
239    public String getErrorMessage() {
240        return aErrorMessage;
241    }
242
243} // AssetManager
